forbiddenContent: The operational core for emergency response systems
failureTitle: P0 production route mismatch: adaptixcore.com is serving the wrong homepage
impact: Public production homepage is reachable but serving the wrong frontend state.
validationCommand: curl -L https://adaptixcore.com/ | grep -E "RUN DISPATCH|CONTROL TRANSPORT|CAPTURE REVENUE|TransportLink|CrewLink|Billing Command"
expectedResult: Required cinematic landing page signatures are present and forbidden fallback signatures are absent.
